zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bruyn於1444年11月30日之前出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Sir Henry Bruyn24歲，母親Elizabeth Darcy20歲。她於1462年2月17日與Thomas Tyrrell, Esq.結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1494年5月1日在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bruyn于1444年11月30日之前出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Sir Henry Bruyn24岁，母亲Elizabeth Darcy20岁。她于1462年2月17日与Thomas Tyrrell, Esq.结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1494年5月1日在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Bruyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bruin
meanings: Dutch: from a personal name based on Middle Dutch bruun ‘brown’, or a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion. Compare De Bruin and Bruyn .
English: of uncertain origin. It may, as Reaney suggested, reflect a pronunciation of French   Brun   ‘brown’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bruyn was born before 30 November 1444, in Essex, England, her father, Sir Henry Bruyn, was 24 and her mother, Elizabeth Darcy, was 20. She married Thomas Tyrrell, Esq. on 17 February 1462. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 1 May 1494, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bruyn est née avant 30 novembre 1444, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Bruyn, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Darcy, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Tyrrell, Esq. le 17 février 1462. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 mai 1494, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bruyn vor 30. November 1444 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Bruyn 24 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Darcy 20. Sie hat am 17. Februar 1462 Thomas Tyrrell, Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb am 1. Mai 1494 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bruyn è nata il prima del 30 novembre 1444 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Bruyn, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Darcy, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Tyrrell, Esq. il 17 febbraio 1462. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 1 maggio 1494, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bruynが1444年11月30日以前にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Bruynは24歳，母Elizabeth Darcyは20歳であった。1462年2月17日にThomas Tyrrell, Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1494年5月1日に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bruyn(이)가 1444년 11월 30일 이전 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Bruyn(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Darcy(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1462년 2월 17일 Thomas Tyrrell, Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1494년 5월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bruyn nasceu antes 30 de novembro de 1444, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Bruyn, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Darcy, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Tyrrell, Esq. em 17 de fevereiro de 1462. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1 de maio de 1494, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bruyn родилась перед 30 ноябрь 1444 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Bruyn было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Darcy, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Tyrrell, Esq. 17 февраля 1462 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 1 мая 1494 г. в её родном городе.
